## Entities.Confections.Converters.fillingOptions variable

Converter for filling options with preferred selection. Validates that preferredId (if specified) exists in options.

**Signature:**

```typescript
fillingOptions: Converter<IOptionsWithPreferred<AnyFillingOption, FillingOptionId>>
```
